loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing total PQ issues and I-THD/V-THD events for PCC Panel 4 feeders; 3rd harmonic, peak-THD, and k-factor columns are not measured by this asset's member meters.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing per-panel harmonic and event data from live member meters; supply-side members (Solar Incomers) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) — voltage THD (V-THD) is not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and V-THD (current only) — voltage THD columns (thd_voltage_*) are present in schema but have no data for this asset; 3rd, 5th, 7th, and peak harmonics are not measured.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic signatures for active feeders; 3rd harmonic, k-factor, and peak-THD columns are not measured by this meter class.
